error_signature: workflow always starts from the beginning
title: Workflow execution restarts from the beginning
symptom: When executing a single node, the workflow restarts from the beginning instead of using cached data from previous nodes.
applies_when: Executing a single node after running the workflow from the start
not_this_if: The workflow has been edited after the last run
The issue does not occur when executing the entire workflow
root_cause: The issue arises because n8n does not retain the data from previous nodes when executing a single node unless data pinning is used. Without pinning, the workflow treats each execution as a fresh start.
fix_steps: Open the node settings for the upstream nodes
Enable data pinning for the nodes you want to retain data from
Try executing the single node again
agent_instruction: Enable data pinning for upstream nodes to retain their data during single node execution.
